entry.title: New: CR 25-12 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 34, CD1 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget to amend Section 3.B.12.c.(3)(viii), Office of the Mayor, Economic Development Program, by changing the appropriation’s name from “Maui Film Festival” to “Maui Economic Development Board, Inc. for the Wailuku Film Festival.”

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
